[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27857560/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ru">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>CatSMP — Minecraft Server</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@700;900&family=Exo+2:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#f5f7fa;--bg2:#eef1f6;--bg3:#e2e8f2;
  --card:#ffffff;--card2:#f8fafd;
  --border:#d4dce8;--border2:#c0cfe0;
  --accent:#3b7dd8;--accent2:#5b9cf6;--accent-soft:#dbeafe;
  --text:#1e293b;--text2:#475569;--text3:#94a3b8;
  --gold:#f59e0b;
  --shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(59,125,216,0.10);
  --shadow2:0 8px 32px rgba(59,125,216,0.13);
}
[data-theme="dark"]{
  --bg:#0f1117;--bg2:#161b27;--bg3:#1e2536;
  --card:#1a2030;--card2:#151c2c;
  --border:#2a3550;--border2:#374060;
  --accent:#5b9cf6;--accent2:#7cb4ff;--accent-soft:#1e3a6e;
  --text:#e8f0fe;--text2:#9ab0cc;--text3:#5a7a99;
  --shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  --shadow2:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
*{cursor:none!important;}

/* ── DEFAULT CURSOR ── */
#cursor{
  width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;
  border:2px solid var(--accent);position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(91,156,246,0.18) 0%,transparent 70%);
  box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(91,156,246,0.3);
  transition:width .18s,height .18s,background .18s,opacity .2s;
}
#cursor::after{content:'';position:absolute;width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}
#cursor.hover{width:46px;height:46px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(91,156,246,0.12) 0%,transparent 70%);}
#cursor-trail{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent2);position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);opacity:0.4;transition:left .16s ease,top .16s ease;}

/* ── BUBLE COSMIC CURSOR ── */
#cursor-buble{
  display:none;
  width:32px;height:32px;position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-size:22px;line-height:1;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(180,100,255,0.8));
  transition:transform .1s;
}
#cursor-trail-buble{
  display:none;
  width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,#c97fff,#7040ff);
  position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);opacity:0.55;
  transition:left .18s ease,top .18s ease;
  box-shadow:0 0 6px #c97fff;
}

/* ── SEAL CURSOR (secret page) ── */
#cursor-seal{
  display:none;
  width:36px;height:36px;position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-size:26px;line-height:1;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(100,180,255,0.7));
}
#cursor-trail-seal{
  display:none;
  width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#aadeee;
  position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);opacity:0.5;
  transition:left .18s ease,top .18s ease;
}

body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;transition:background .3s,color .3s;}

/* dot pattern */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(91,156,246,0.07) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:28px 28px;opacity:.6;}
[data-theme='dark'] body::before{opacity:.22;}

/* THEME BTN */
.theme-btn{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:28px;z-index:2000;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--border2);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3rem;transition:all .25s;}
.theme-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.12);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(91,156,246,0.25);}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:14px 40px;background:rgba(245,247,250,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .3s,border-color .3s;}
[data-theme='dark'] nav{background:rgba(15,17,23,0.92);}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:900;
  color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:3px;text-decoration:none;text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(91,156,246,0.3);}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.nav-link{font-weight:600;font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--text2);text-decoration:none;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid transparent;transition:all .25s;}
.nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--accent);border-color:rgba(91,156,246,0.3);background:var(--accent-soft);}
.nav-buble{color:#9b6fff!important;background:rgba(155,111,255,0.08)!important;border-color:rgba(155,111,255,0.3)!important;}
.nav-buble:hover,.nav-buble.active{color:#c97fff!important;background:rgba(155,111,255,0.18)!important;border-color:rgba(155,111,255,0.5)!important;box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(155,111,255,0.25)!important;}

/* SECTIONS */
.section{display:none;position:relative;z-index:1;min-height:100vh;padding:110px 0 80px;}
.section.active{display:block;}
#home,#home.active{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;}
.container{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 40px;}

/* HERO */
.hero-badge{display:inline-block;font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,0.3);padding:6px 20px;border-radius:20px;
  background:var(--accent-soft);margin-bottom:26px;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both;}
.hero-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,8.5vw,6.5rem);font-weight:900;
  line-height:1;color:var(--text);text-align:center;
  text-shadow:0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.06),0 0 40px rgba(91,156,246,0.15);
  animation:fadeUp .7s .12s ease both;margin-bottom:14px;}
.hero-title span{color:var(--accent);}
.hero-sub{font-size:1rem;color:var(--text2);max-width:500px;line-height:1.8;
  animation:fadeUp .7s .25s ease both;margin-bottom:38px;text-align:center;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;
  animation:fadeUp .7s .37s ease both;margin-bottom:48px;}
.btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:10px;
  background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;text-decoration:none;
  letter-spacing:.8px;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(59,125,216,0.35);transition:all .25s;border:none;}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(59,125,216,0.45);}
.btn-secondary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:13px 28px;border-radius:10px;
  background:var(--card);color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;text-decoration:none;
  letter-spacing:.8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border2);transition:all .25s;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.btn-secondary:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.hero-ip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--card);
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 26px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  animation:fadeUp .7s .5s ease both;}
.hero-ip span{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.hero-ip code{font-size:1rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:2px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}
.copy-btn{background:var(--accent-soft);border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,0.3);
  color:var(--accent);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 12px;font-size:0.74rem;letter-spacing:.8px;transition:all .2s;}
.copy-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}

/* SECTION HEADER */
.section-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:52px;}
.section-label{font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:12px;display:block;}
.section-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,4vw,2.6rem);color:var(--text);margin-bottom:16px;}
.section-divider{width:70px;height:2px;margin:0 auto;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--accent),transparent);}

/* ABOUT */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:44px;align-items:start;}
.about-text p{color:var(--text2);line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:.98rem;}
.about-text p strong{color:var(--accent);}
.about-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:24px;}
.stat-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:18px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;}
.stat-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent2);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--accent);}
.stat-label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text3);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;}
.feature-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.feature-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius:10px;padding:18px 20px;display:flex;gap:13px;align-items:flex-start;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;}
.feature-card:hover{transform:translateX(6px);border-color:var(--accent2);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.feat-icon{font-size:1.5rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.feat-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;font-size:.93rem;}
.feat-desc{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;}

/* MODS */
.mods-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(205px,1fr));gap:11px;margin-bottom:34px;}
.mod-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.mod-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:bottom;transition:transform .3s;}
.mod-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent2);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.mod-card:hover::before{transform:scaleY(1);}
.mod-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.mod-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.86rem;color:var(--text);}
.mod-tag{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;}
.libs-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center;}
.libs-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:34px;}
.lib-pill{background:var(--accent-soft);border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,0.25);border-radius:20px;padding:6px 15px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent);}
.download-btn-wrap{text-align:center;}

/* RULES */
.rules-list{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;}
.rule-item{display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:flex-start;padding:22px 26px;background:var(--card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;margin-bottom:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;}
.rule-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent2);transform:translateX(6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);}
.rule-num{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:2rem;color:rgba(91,156,246,0.18);flex-shrink:0;line-height:1;font-weight:900;}
.rule-title{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px;}
.rule-desc{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.6;}
.rule-warning{background:var(--accent-soft);border:1px solid rgba(91,156,246,0.25);
  border-radius:10px;padding:14px 20px;color:var(--accent);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.6;
  max-width:700px;margin:22px auto 0;text-align:center;}

/* MASCOTS */
.mascots-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:26px;justify-items:center;}
.mascot-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;
  max-width:340px;width:100%;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .35s;}
.mascot-card:hover{transform:translateY(-9px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);border-color:var(--accent2);}
.mascot-img-wrap{overflow:hidden;height:300px;}
.mascot-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;transition:transform .45s;}
.mascot-card:hover .mascot-img-wrap img{transform:scale(1.06);}
.mascot-info{padding:20px 22px 24px;text-align:center;}
.mascot-name{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:8px;}
.mascot-desc{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.65;}

/* ADMIN */
.admin-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:22px;justify-items:center;}
.admin-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;
  text-align:center;width:100%;max-width:280px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:all .3s;}
.admin-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow2);border-color:var(--accent2);}
.admin-img{width:100%;height:210px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;}
.admin-info{padding:18px;}
.admin-name{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px;}
.admin-role{display:inline-block;font-size:0.67rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#fff;background:var(--accent);border-radius:10px;padding:3px 12px;margin-bottom:9px;}
.admin-desc{font-size:.81rem;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.55;}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
   BUBLE — FULL COSMIC
═══════════════════════════════════════ */
#buble{
  background:transparent;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.buble-space-bg{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 80% at 50% 0%,rgba(80,20,140,0.55) 0%,transparent 55%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 10% 100%,rgba(40,0,120,0.4) 0%,transparent 55%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 90% 60%,rgba(100,0,180,0.3) 0%,transparent 55%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,#050010 0%,#0a0020 50%,#060015 100%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s;
}
.buble-nebula{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 30% at 20% 40%,rgba(180,50,255,0.12) 0%,transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 80% 70%,rgba(80,120,255,0.10) 0%,transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 30% at 60% 20%,rgba(255,80,180,0.07) 0%,transparent 60%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .8s .2s;
  filter:blur(2px);
}
.stars-wrap{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s .1s;}
.star{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;animation:twinkle linear infinite;}
@keyframes twinkle{0%,100%{opacity:.1;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.5);}}
.shooting-star{
  position:absolute;width:80px;height:1.5px;border-radius:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.9),transparent);
  animation:shoot linear infinite;opacity:0;
}
@keyframes shoot{
  0%{transform:translateX(-100px) translateY(0) rotate(-30deg);opacity:0;}
  5%{opacity:1;}
  40%{opacity:.6;}
  60%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(120vw) translateY(80px) rotate(-30deg);}
  100%{opacity:0;}
}
.buble-active .buble-space-bg{opacity:1;}
.buble-active .buble-nebula{opacity:1;}
.buble-active .stars-wrap{opacity:1;}
.buble-active body::before{opacity:0;}

.buble-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:24px;}
.buble-hdr{text-align:center;}
.buble-main-title{
  font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,6vw,3.5rem);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e0aaff,#c77dff,#9b5de5,#7b2d8b);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
  text-shadow:none;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(180,100,255,0.5));
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.buble-sub-txt{color:#b09fd4;font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.buble-img-card{
  background:rgba(30,5,60,0.6);border:1.5px solid rgba(180,100,255,0.35);
  border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;max-width:420px;width:100%;
  box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(155,93,229,0.25),0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  transition:all .4s;
}
.buble-img-card:hover{transform:scale(1.03);border-color:rgba(200,130,255,0.6);box-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(155,93,229,0.45),0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);}
.buble-img-card img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;}
.planet{
  position:fixed;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:1;opacity:0;transition:opacity .8s;
}
.buble-active .planet{opacity:1;}
.planet-1{width:120px;height:120px;bottom:10%;left:-30px;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,#6a0dad,#2d0057);
  box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(106,13,173,0.4);animation:floatPlanet 12s ease-in-out infinite;}
.planet-2{width:60px;height:60px;top:15%;right:5%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 40% 30%,#1a0050,#08001a);
  box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(80,0,180,0.3),inset -8px -8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  animation:floatPlanet 9s ease-in-out infinite reverse;}
.planet-ring{
  position:absolute;width:150%;height:30%;top:50%;left:-25%;
  border:3px solid rgba(180,100,255,0.2);border-radius:50%;transform:rotateX(70deg);
}
@keyframes floatPlanet{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-18px);}}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
   SECRET SEAL PAGE
═══════════════════════════════════════ */
#secret{
  display:none;position:relative;z-index:1;min-height:100vh;padding:100px 0 60px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#e8f4ff 0%,#d0e8f8 50%,#c0dcf4 100%);
}
#secret.active{display:block;}
.secret-bg-seals{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ddf0ff 0%,#c8e4f5 60%,#b0d5ee 100%);
}
/* floating seals background */
.bg-seal{
  position:absolute;font-size:2rem;opacity:0.08;animation:floatSeal linear infinite;
  pointer-events:none;user-select:none;
}
@keyframes floatSeal{
  0%{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg);opacity:0;}
  10%{opacity:0.12;}
  90%{opacity:0.06;}
  100%{transform:translateY(-10vh) rotate(20deg);opacity:0;}
}
.secret-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:24px;}
.secret-badge{
  display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a9edd,#2b6cb0);
  color:#fff;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:7px 22px;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(74,158,221,0.35);
  animation:fadeUp .6s ease both;
}
.secret-title{
  font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,5vw,3.2rem);
  color:#1a4a7a;text-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(74,158,221,0.2);
  animation:fadeUp .6s .1s ease both;
}
.secret-emoji{font-size:4rem;animation:bounceSeal 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bounceSeal{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}};
.secret-text{font-size:1rem;color:#2d5a8a;line-height:1.8;max-width:560px;animation:fadeUp .6s .2s ease both;}
.secret-code-box{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);border:2px solid rgba(74,158,221,0.4);
  border-radius:16px;padding:28px 36px;max-width:500px;width:100%;
  box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(74,158,221,0.15);animation:fadeUp .6s .3s ease both;
}
.secret-code-label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#4a9edd;margin-bottom:12px;}
.secret-phrase{
  font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:#1a4a7a;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d0ebff,#b8d9f5);
  border:1.5px solid rgba(74,158,221,0.3);border-radius:10px;
  padding:14px 24px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:14px;
  box-shadow:inset 0 2px 8px rgba(74,158,221,0.1);
}
.secret-hint{font-size:.85rem;color:#4a7a9b;line-height:1.65;}
.secret-hint a{color:#2b6cb0;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;}
.secret-seal-img{
  border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;max-width:320px;width:100%;
  border:3px solid rgba(74,158,221,0.3);box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(74,158,221,0.2);
  animation:fadeUp .6s .4s ease both;
}
.secret-seal-img img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;}
.back-btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  padding:11px 24px;border-radius:10px;background:#2b6cb0;
  color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.8px;
  border:none;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(43,108,176,0.35);transition:all .25s;
  animation:fadeUp .6s .5s ease both;
}
.back-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(43,108,176,0.45);}

/* click ripple */
.ripple{position:fixed;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9000;
  border:2px solid;animation:rippleOut .5s ease-out forwards;}
@keyframes rippleOut{from{width:0;height:0;opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}
  to{width:80px;height:80px;opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}}

/* FOOTER */
footer{position:relative;z-index:1;text-align:center;padding:32px 20px 24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);font-size:.78rem;}
footer .footer-logo{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;color:var(--accent);font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
footer a{color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;}

@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:12px 14px;}
  .nav-links{gap:2px;}
  .nav-link{padding:6px 8px;font-size:.68rem;}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .container{padding:0 16px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Cursors -->
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-trail"></div>
<div id="cursor-buble">🌟</div>
<div id="cursor-trail-buble"></div>
<div id="cursor-seal">🦭</div>
<div id="cursor-trail-seal"></div>

<!-- Buble cosmic layers (fixed, always in DOM) -->
<div class="buble-space-bg"></div>
<div class="buble-nebula"></div>
<div class="stars-wrap" id="starsWrap"></div>
<div class="planet planet-1"><div class="planet-ring"></div></div>
<div class="planet planet-2"></div>

<!-- Secret seal bg -->
<div class="secret-bg-seals" id="secretBg" style="display:none;"></div>

<button class="theme-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()" id="themeBtn" title="Тема">🌙</button>

<nav id="mainNav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo" onclick="showSection('home');return false;">CatSMP</a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a class="nav-link active" onclick="showSection('home');return false;">Главная</a>
    <a class="nav-link" onclick="showSection('about');return false;">О сервере</a>
    <a class="nav-link" onclick="showSection('mods');return false;">Моды</a>
    <a class="nav-link" onclick="showSection('rules');return false;">Правила</a>
    <a class="nav-link" onclick="showSection('mascots');return false;">Маскоты</a>
    <a class="nav-link" onclick="showSection('admin');return false;">Администрация</a>
    <a class="nav-link nav-buble" onclick="showSection('buble');return false;">🌌 Бубля</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="https://discord.gg/QjUfawNQW" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold);">Discord</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HOME -->
<section id="home" class="section active">
  <div style="text-align:center;padding:0 20px;position:relative;z-index:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;">
    <div class="hero-badge">🐾 Minecraft SMP • Create Mods • Community</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Cat<span>SMP</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Добро пожаловать на CatSMP — место, где строят, сражаются и создают. Присоединяйся к сообществу и оставь свой след в этом мире.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="https://discord.gg/QjUfawNQW" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">
        <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057.1 18.1.12 18.14.148 18.17a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028 14.09 14.09 0 0 0 1.226-1.994.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03z"/></svg>
        Discord сервер
      </a>
      <a href="#" onclick="showSection('mods');return false;" class="btn-secondary">⚙️ Список модов</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-ip">
      <span>IP сервера</span>
      <code>catsmp.net</code>
      <button class="copy-btn" onclick="copyIP()">Копировать</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-label">О проекте</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Что такое CatSMP?</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text">
        <p><strong>CatSMP</strong> — Minecraft SMP-сервер с богатой механикой модов серии <strong>Create</strong>. Здесь каждый может найти своё место: инженер, боец, строитель или дипломат.</p>
        <p>Сервер предлагает свободу действий: строй летающие корабли, запускай пушки, прокладывай железные дороги и создавай механические шедевры — всё ограничено лишь твоей фантазией.</p>
        <p>CatSMP — живое сообщество. Здесь есть <strong>политика, торговля, альянсы и конфликты</strong>. Ты сам решаешь, кем стать в этом мире.</p>
        <div class="about-stats">
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">16+</div><div class="stat-label">Модов</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">SMP</div><div class="stat-label">Режим</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">🐾</div><div class="stat-label">CatSMP</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-num">∞</div><div class="stat-label">Возможностей</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-cards">
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="feat-icon">✈️</div><div><div class="feat-title">Летающие корабли</div><div class="feat-desc">Create Aeronautics — строй воздушные суда с физикой и управляй ими в реальном времени.</div></div></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="feat-icon">💣</div><div><div class="feat-title">Боевые машины</div><div class="feat-desc">Create Big Cannons — продвинутая артиллерия и военные механизмы для сражений.</div></div></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="feat-icon">⚙️</div><div><div class="feat-title">Заводы и фабрики</div><div class="feat-desc">Конвейеры, дизельные генераторы, передачи — строй промышленные комплексы.</div></div></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="feat-icon">🚂</div><div><div class="feat-title">Железные дороги</div><div class="feat-desc">Create: Tracks — полноценный транспорт для грузов и пассажиров по всему миру.</div></div></div>
        <div class="feature-card"><div class="feat-icon">⚖️</div><div><div class="feat-title">Политика и право</div><div class="feat-desc">Создавай фракции, суды, тюрьмы — сервер живёт по законам, которые пишут сами игроки.</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MODS -->
<section id="mods" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-label">Сборка</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Список модов</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="mods-grid">
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">⚙️</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create</div><div class="mod-tag">Основной мод</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">✈️</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create Aeronautics</div><div class="mod-tag">Летающие корабли</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">💣</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create Big Cannons</div><div class="mod-tag">Артиллерия</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🔧</div><div><div class="mod-name">CBC: Advanced Tech</div><div class="mod-tag">Передовые технологии</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🚀</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create Propulsion</div><div class="mod-tag">Симулированное движение</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🔌</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Connected</div><div class="mod-tag">Соединения</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🪞</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Copycats+</div><div class="mod-tag">Копирование блоков</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">⛽</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Diesel Gen.</div><div class="mod-tag">Дизельные генераторы</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🌀</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Ender Trans.</div><div class="mod-tag">Эндер-передачи</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🛡️</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Steel Armor</div><div class="mod-tag">Стальная броня и блоки</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🖼️</div><div><div class="mod-name">FramedBlocks</div><div class="mod-tag">Декоративные блоки</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🌅</div><div><div class="mod-name">Vista</div><div class="mod-tag">Пейзажи</div></div></div>
      <div class="mod-card"><div class="mod-icon">🚂</div><div><div class="mod-name">Create: Tracks</div><div class="mod-tag">Железные дороги</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin:36px 0 16px;">
      <div class="libs-title">📚 Библиотеки</div>
      <div class="libs-grid">
        <span class="lib-pill">Architectury API</span><span class="lib-pill">Sable</span>
        <span class="lib-pill">MaFgLib</span><span class="lib-pill">Ritchie's Projectile Library</span>
        <span class="lib-pill">Moonlight Lib</span><span class="lib-pill">Cloth Config API</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="download-btn-wrap">
      <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1sHU2BLMz7QXY3lHqBnJp6hVmIzdnwvj0?usp=sharing" target="_blank" class="btn-primary" style="font-size:.95rem;padding:14px 36px;">📥 Скачать все моды</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RULES -->
<section id="rules" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-label">Свод правил</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Правила сервера</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rules-list">
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">01</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">🚫 Никаких читов</div><div class="rule-desc">Запрещено использование любых читов, хаков, дюпов и нечестных преимуществ.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">02</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">🤝 Уважай игроков</div><div class="rule-desc">Относись к другим участникам с уважением. Токсичность и оскорбления недопустимы.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">03</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">⚡ Никаких лаг-машин</div><div class="rule-desc">Запрещено создание конструкций, намеренно нагружающих сервер.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">04</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">⚔️ Ограниченные виды PvP</div><div class="rule-desc">Некоторые виды PvP запрещены. Подробности — на нашем <a href="https://discord.gg/QjUfawNQW" target="_blank" style="color:var(--accent);">Discord-сервере</a>.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">05</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">⚖️ Право на самосуд</div><div class="rule-desc">Гриферство и PvP в целом не запрещены — игроки имеют право на самосуд. Разрешено строить тюрьмы, суды и вести переписи населения.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-item"><div class="rule-num">06</div><div class="rule-content"><div class="rule-title">📜 Правила — это текст</div><div class="rule-desc">Администрация вправе выдавать наказания за любое нарушение здравого смысла, даже если оно прямо не указано в правилах.</div></div></div>
      <div class="rule-warning">⚠️ Наказания могут быть выданы по усмотрению администрации — даже если нарушение явно не описано выше.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MASCOTS -->
<section id="mascots" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-label">Символы</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Маскоты сервера</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="mascots-grid">
      <div class="mascot-card" id="sealMascotCard" title="Нажми на меня!">
        <div class="mascot-img-wrap"><img id="mascotSeal" alt="Тюлень"></div>
        <div class="mascot-info">
          <div class="mascot-name">🦭 Белый Тюлень</div>
          <div class="mascot-desc">Первый маскот CatSMP. Пушистый и жизнерадостный — нажми, чтобы услышать!</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mascot-card" id="catMascotCard" title="Нажми на меня!">
        <div class="mascot-img-wrap"><img id="mascotCat" alt="Бонго кот"></div>
        <div class="mascot-info">
          <div class="mascot-name">🎹 Бонго Кот</div>
          <div class="mascot-desc">Музыкальный маскот сервера. Играет на пианино — нажми, чтобы услышать!</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ADMIN -->
<section id="admin" class="section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-header">
      <span class="section-label">Команда</span>
      <h2 class="section-title">Администрация</h2>
      <div class="section-divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-grid">
      <div class="admin-card">
        <img class="admin-img" id="adminTulen" alt="tulen">
        <div class="admin-info">
          <div class="admin-name">tulen</div>
          <div class="admin-role">Основатель</div>
          <div class="admin-desc">Основатель и главный администратор CatSMP.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-card">
        <img class="admin-img" id="adminBelarusick" alt="belarusick">
        <div class="admin-info">
          <div class="admin-name">belarusick</div>
          <div class="admin-role">Администратор</div>
          <div class="admin-desc">Со-администратор. Помогает в развитии и поддержке сервера.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-card">
        <img class="admin-img" id="adminGnom" alt="gnom.33.0">
        <div class="admin-info">
          <div class="admin-name">gnom.33.0</div>
          <div class="admin-role">Младший Админ</div>
          <div class="admin-desc">Помогает команде и поддерживает новых игроков на сервере.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-card">
        <img class="admin-img" id="adminKafiner" alt="kafiner">
        <div class="admin-info">
          <div class="admin-name">kafiner</div>
          <div class="admin-role">Модератор</div>
          <div class="admin-desc">Следит за порядком, помогает игрокам и разрешает споры.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BUBLE -->
<section id="buble" class="section">
  <div class="container" style="position:relative;z-index:2;">
    <div class="section-header buble-hdr">
      <span class="section-label" style="color:#c97fff;letter-spacing:5px;">✦ Тайная вкладка ✦</span>
      <h2 class="section-title buble-main-title">🌌 Бубля 🌌</h2>
      <div class="section-divider" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#9b5de5,transparent);"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="buble-content">
      <p class="buble-sub-txt">добро пожаловать в космос бубли</p>
      <div class="buble-img-card" id="bubleCard">
        <img id="bubleImg" alt="Бубля" style="width:100%;height:auto;display:block;">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SECRET SEAL PAGE (hidden, no nav) -->
<section id="secret" class="section">
  <div class="container" style="position:relative;z-index:2;">
    <div class="secret-content">
      <div class="secret-badge">🦭 Секретная страница • Ты нашёл это!</div>
      <h2 class="secret-title">Ты нашёл секрет!</h2>
      <div class="secret-emoji">🦭</div>
      <p class="secret-text">
        Поздравляем! Ты кликнул по тюленю достаточно раз, чтобы раскрыть тайну CatSMP.<br>
        За тобой скрывался целый мир, о котором мало кто знает.
      </p>
      <div class="secret-code-box">
        <div class="secret-code-label">🔑 Кодовая фраза для Discord</div>
        <div class="secret-phrase">большой тюлень</div>
        <div class="secret-hint">
          Напиши эту фразу любому администратору в нашем<br>
          <a href="https://discord.gg/QjUfawNQW" target="_blank">Discord-сервере</a>
          и получи эксклюзивную роль! 🎉
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="secret-seal-img">
        <img id="secretSealImg" alt="Секретный тюлень">
      </div>
      <button class="back-btn" onclick="showSection('home')">← Вернуться на главную</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer id="mainFooter">
  <div class="footer-logo">CatSMP</div>
  <p>Minecraft SMP Server • Create Mods • Community</p>
  <p style="margin-top:8px;"><a href="https://discord.gg/QjUfawNQW" target="_blank">Discord сервер</a></p>
</footer>

<script>
// ─── IMAGE DATA ───
const IMG = {
  seal:  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  bongo: "data:image/png;base64,",
  dog:   "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  gnome: "data:image/png;base64,",
  cat:   "data:image/png;base64,"
};

window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.getElementById('mascotSeal').src       = IMG.seal;
  document.getElementById('mascotCat').src        = IMG.bongo;
  document.getElementById('adminTulen').src       = IMG.seal;
  document.getElementById('adminBelarusick').src  = IMG.cat;
  document.getElementById('adminGnom').src        = IMG.gnome;
  document.getElementById('adminKafiner').src     = IMG.dog;
  document.getElementById('bubleImg').src         = IMG.cat;
  document.getElementById('secretSealImg').src    = IMG.seal;
  buildStars();
  buildSecretBg();
});

// ─── STARS ───
function buildStars() {
  const wrap = document.getElementById('starsWrap');
  wrap.innerHTML = '';
  for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
    const s = document.createElement('div'); s.className = 'star';
    const sz = Math.random() * 2.5 + 0.5;
    s.style.cssText = `width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;top:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*4+2}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*6}s;`;
    wrap.appendChild(s);
  }
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    const sh = document.createElement('div'); sh.className = 'shooting-star';
    sh.style.cssText = `top:${Math.random()*60}%;left:${Math.random()*40}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*4+4}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*12}s;`;
    wrap.appendChild(sh);
  }
}

// ─── SECRET BG SEALS ───
function buildSecretBg() {
  const bg = document.getElementById('secretBg');
  bg.innerHTML = '';
  const emojis = ['🦭','🦭','🐟','❄️','🦭'];
  for (let i = 0; i < 22; i++) {
    const s = document.createElement('div'); s.className = 'bg-seal';
    s.textContent = emojis[Math.floor(Math.random()*emojis.length)];
    s.style.cssText = `left:${Math.random()*100}%;font-size:${Math.random()*2+1.2}rem;animation-duration:${Math.random()*14+10}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*15}s;`;
    bg.appendChild(s);
  }
}

// ─── CURSOR ───
let cursorMode = 'default'; // 'default' | 'buble' | 'seal'
const cur     = document.getElementById('cursor');
const curTr   = document.getElementById('cursor-trail');
const curB    = document.getElementById('cursor-buble');
const curBTr  = document.getElementById('cursor-trail-buble');
const curS    = document.getElementById('cursor-seal');
const curSTr  = document.getElementById('cursor-trail-seal');

let mx = 0, my = 0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
  if (cursorMode === 'default') {
    cur.style.left = mx+'px'; cur.style.top = my+'px';
    setTimeout(() => { curTr.style.left = mx+'px'; curTr.style.top = my+'px'; }, 110);
  } else if (cursorMode === 'buble') {
    curB.style.left = mx+'px'; curB.style.top = my+'px';
    setTimeout(() => { curBTr.style.left = mx+'px'; curBTr.style.top = my+'px'; }, 115);
  } else if (cursorMode === 'seal') {
    curS.style.left = mx+'px'; curS.style.top = my+'px';
    setTimeout(() => { curSTr.style.left = mx+'px'; curSTr.style.top = my+'px'; }, 115);
  }
});

function setCursorMode(mode) {
  cursorMode = mode;
  cur.style.display   = mode === 'default' ? 'block' : 'none';
  curTr.style.display = mode === 'default' ? 'block' : 'none';
  curB.style.display  = mode === 'buble'   ? 'block' : 'none';
  curBTr.style.display= mode === 'buble'   ? 'block' : 'none';
  curS.style.display  = mode === 'seal'    ? 'block' : 'none';
  curSTr.style.display= mode === 'seal'    ? 'block' : 'none';
}

document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.mod-card,.admin-card,.mascot-card,.rule-item,.feature-card,.stat-card').forEach(el => {
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { if(cursorMode==='default') cur.classList.add('hover'); });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cur.classList.remove('hover'));
});

// ─── AUDIO CONTEXT ───
const AudioCtx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
let audioCtx = null;
function getAudio() { if (!audioCtx) audioCtx = new AudioCtx(); return audioCtx; }

function playMeow() {
  const ctx = getAudio();
  // synthesise a basic meow: frequency sweep + tremolo
  const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
  const gain = ctx.createGain();
  const now = ctx.currentTime;
  osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination);
  osc.type = 'sawtooth';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(700, now);
  osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(1100, now + 0.08);
  osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(850, now + 0.18);
  osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(950, now + 0.28);
  osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(700, now + 0.45);
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0, now);
  gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.18, now + 0.04);
  gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.14, now + 0.25);
  gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, now + 0.5);
  // add a filter to soften
  const filt = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); filt.type='lowpass'; filt.frequency.value=2200;
  osc.disconnect(); osc.connect(filt); filt.connect(gain);
  osc.start(now); osc.stop(now + 0.55);
}

function playSealSound() {
  const ctx = getAudio();
  const now = ctx.currentTime;
  // seal: low guttural bark -> higher squeak cycle
  const barks = [
    {f0:220, f1:340, f2:180, dur:0.25},
    {f0:240, f1:380, f2:200, dur:0.25},
    {f0:260, f1:420, f2:180, dur:0.3}
  ];
  let t = now;
  barks.forEach(b => {
    const o = ctx.createOscillator();
    const g = ctx.createGain();
    const filt = ctx.createBiquadFilter(); filt.type='bandpass'; filt.frequency.value=500; filt.Q.value=2;
    o.connect(filt); filt.connect(g); g.connect(ctx.destination);
    o.type = 'sawtooth';
    o.frequency.setValueAtTime(b.f0, t);
    o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(b.f1, t + b.dur*0.4);
    o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(b.f2, t + b.dur);
    g.gain.setValueAtTime(0, t);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.22, t + 0.03);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.15, t + b.dur * 0.7);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, t + b.dur);
    o.start(t); o.stop(t + b.dur + 0.05);
    t += b.dur + 0.06;
  });
}

// ─── SEAL CLICK EASTER EGG ───
let sealClicks = [], sealTimer = null;
document.getElementById('sealMascotCard').addEventListener('click', e => {
  playSealSound();
  spawnRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY, '#60b4dd');
  const now = Date.now();
  sealClicks.push(now);
  sealClicks = sealClicks.filter(t => now - t < 5000);
  if (sealClicks.length >= 5) {
    sealClicks = [];
    setTimeout(() => showSection('secret'), 300);
  }
});

document.getElementById('catMascotCard').addEventListener('click', e => {
  playMeow();
  spawnRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY, '#5b9cf6');
});

document.getElementById('bubleCard').addEventListener('click', e => {
  playMeow();
  spawnRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY, '#9b5de5');
});

function spawnRipple(x, y, color) {
  const r = document.createElement('div'); r.className = 'ripple';
  r.style.cssText = `left:${x}px;top:${y}px;border-color:${color};`;
  document.body.appendChild(r);
  setTimeout(() => r.remove(), 520);
}

// ─── THEME ───
let dark = false;
function toggleTheme() {
  dark = !dark;
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', dark ? 'dark' : '');
  document.getElementById('themeBtn').textContent = dark ? '☀️' : '🌙';
}

// ─── NAVIGATION ───
function showSection(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.section').forEach(s => { s.classList.remove('active'); s.style.display = 'none'; });
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));

  const sec = document.getElementById(id);
  if (sec) { sec.style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(() => sec.classList.add('active'), 10); }

  // cosmic buble mode
  if (id === 'buble') {
    document.body.classList.add('buble-active');
    setCursorMode('buble');
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.background = 'rgba(5,0,16,0.88)';
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.borderColor = 'rgba(155,93,229,0.25)';
  } else if (id === 'secret') {
    document.body.classList.remove('buble-active');
    setCursorMode('seal');
    document.getElementById('secretBg').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('mainFooter').style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    document.body.classList.remove('buble-active');
    setCursorMode('default');
    document.getElementById('secretBg').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.display = '';
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.background = '';
    document.getElementById('mainNav').style.borderColor = '';
    document.getElementById('mainFooter').style.display = '';
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => {
    const oc = l.getAttribute('onclick') || '';
    if (oc.includes("'"+id+"'")) l.classList.add('active');
  });
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

function copyIP() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText('catsmp.net').then(() => {
    const b = document.querySelector('.copy-btn'); b.textContent = '✓ Скопировано!';
    setTimeout(() => b.textContent = 'Копировать', 2000);
  });
}

showSection('home');
</script>
</body>
</html>
